mechanism_narrative: A decline in FEDFUNDS signals easier discounting and lower recession fear, which lifts equity valuations and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS declines are followed by negative 20-day SPX returns more often than positive returns, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above a recession-like threshold signals deteriorating household income and weaker demand, which should push S&P 500 returns negative over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if episodes with UNRATE above 9.5% produce positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the sign of the signal is not negative in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and HOUST both improve, it indicates broadening domestic demand and a firmer business cycle, which should support positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint RSAFS/HOUST improvement does not outperform either series alone, or if triggered episodes fail to generate positive 60-day returns more often than not.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in INDPRO marks an industrial production shock and signals weakening earnings expectations, which should lead to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls more than 1.0% over 1 month
failure_condition: Reject if large INDPRO monthly declines are not followed by negative 5-day SPX returns, or if the short-horizon Rank IC is indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: A rising CPIAUCSL with unchanged or lower FEDFUNDS compresses real rates and supports risk assets, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-above-policy episodes do not lead to positive 20-day returns, or if the effect disappears when FEDFUNDS is below CPIAUCSL by more than 1 percentage point.

mechanism_narrative: Declining PAYEMS indicates labor-market contraction and weaker consumer income growth, which should translate into negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if payroll declines are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in a majority of triggered instances, or if the signal has no stable out-of-sample sign.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous collapse in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL inflation indicates aggressive policy easing into disinflation, which should raise equity multiples and support positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint easing and disinflation do not produce positive 5-day SPX returns more often than the unconditional baseline, or if the interaction term is unstable across rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: In a housing-led recovery, rising HOUST combined with improving GDPC1 indicates stronger final demand and should produce positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST 3-month change > 0 and latest GDPC1 print is rising
failure_condition: Reject if housing and GDP improvement episodes fail to yield positive 60-day returns, or if the joint condition underperforms either proxy alone in walk-forward testing.
